title: UpdaterRules
description: Schema for config/updater.rules.yaml — VYRA module update rules.

rules.description: Ordered list of rules. The first matching condition wins.

condition.description: Version bump type that triggers this rule.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule does.

operations.description: List of file operations to execute.

action.description: mirror/copy: recursive copy | transform: file copy with optional extension rename | symlink: create symlink (no data copy, for large volumes)

src.description: Source path. Use /old_vol/ or /new_vol/ as placeholders.

dest.description: Destination path. Use /old_vol/ or /new_vol/ as placeholders.

ext.description: For transform action only: target file extension (e.g. '.json').

hooks.description: Optional hook scripts (relative paths inside the module directory).

pre_import.description: Script to run before data migration.

post_import.description: Script to run after successful data migration.

on_failure.description: Script to run if the upgrade fails.
